publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-02-03 18:38:42 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: A collection of rare printed materials, artwork and other images documenting the ideas and influence of the Situationist International.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Situationist International (SI) was an international organization of social revolutionaries made up of avant-garde artists, intellectuals, and political theorists, prominent in Europe from its formation in 1957 to its dissolution in 1972.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: A collection of rare printed materials, artwork and other images documenting the ideas and influence of the Situationist International. Material includes 291 publications (70 books; 195 zines, pamphlets, and periodicals; 25 exhibit catalogs), 84 fliers & handbills, posters & stickers, 4 pieces of original artwork, 3 photographs, 4 prints, approximately 100 leaves of photocopied materials.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series III. Artwork Box 3-5, Mapcase Folders 1-2

list.head: Books - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
list.item: Andreotti, Libero & Xavier Costa. Situacionistas: arte, politica, urbanismo, 1996
Andreotti, Libero & Xavier Costa. Theory of the Dérive and other situationist writings on the city, 1996
Anonymous, Stasi Slut, 1992
Astronauts of Inner-Space, 1966
Atkins, Guy. Asger Jorn the crucial years: 1954-1964 , 1977
Becker-Ho, Alice & Guy Debord. A Game of War, 2007
Blazwick, Iwona. An endless adventure…an endless passion…an endless banquet: A Situationist Scrapbook , 1989
Brand, Paul. Constant: Opstand van de Homo Ludens , 1969
Brau, Eliane. Le Situationnisme ou la Nouvelle Internationale , 1968
Coeurderoy, Ernest. Pour le Révolution , 1972
Constant: New Babylon
Coverley, Merlin. Psychogeography , 2006
Davidson, Steef. De Kunst Van Het Protest/The Art of the Protest: Posters 1965-1975 , 1981
Davidson, Steef. Images de la Revolte: 1965-1975 , 1982
Debord, Guy. Comments on the Society of the Spectacle , 2002
Debord, Guy. Considerations on the Assassination of Gerard Lebovici , 2001
Debord, Guy. Correspondence: The Foundation of the Situationist International (June 1957- August 1960), 2009 (2 copies)
Debord, Guy. La Societe do Spectacle, 1967
Debord, Guy. Mémoires, 1993
Debord, Guy. The Society of the Spectacle: The Lisp Translation, 2009
Dejacques, Claude. A Toi L'Angoisse a Moi La Rage , 1968
Elmqvist, Annika & Gittan Jönsson. Annmari Langemar, Pål Rydberg, Historieboken, 1970
Ford, Simon. The Realization and Suppression of the Situationist International: An Annotated Bibliography 1972-1992 , 1995
Frankrike 68 Kampen Fortsätter , 1968
Gaillard, Alice. Les Diggers: Révolution et contre-culture à San Francisco (1966-1968), 2014
Gruppe SPUR. Die Zeitschrift SPUR , 1962
Home, Stewart. What Is Situationism? A Reader , 1996
Hussey, Andrew. The Game of War: The Life nad Death of Guy Debord , 2001
Internationale Situationniste 1958-69, (original), 1970
Internationale Situationniste 1958-69, (reprint), 1970
Jorn, Asger. Guldhorn og Lykkehjul, 1957
Jorn, Asger. Jorn a Venezia, 1963
Jorn, Asger. La Flûte de Jade/Jadefløjten/The Jade Flute, 1970
Jorn, Asger. Modifications, 1998
Jorn, Asger. Naturens Orden, 1962
Jorn, Asger. Pour la forme, 2001
Jorn, Asger. Ting Pölis, 1964
Jorn, Asger. Værdi og Økonomi, 1962
Kaufmann, Vincent. Guy Debord , 2003
Knaab, Ken. Public Secrets , 1997
Knaab, Ken. Situationist International Anthology, 1981
Krojer, Tom. Tilliblivelsen , 1977
Lambert, Jean-Clarence. New Babylon Constant: Art et Utopie , 1997
Laumer, March & Hardy Strid. Hardy Strid: The Situationist Superman in Hemol Langauge , 1983
Levy, "Yank" Bert. Guerrilla Warfare, 1964
L'Histoire du Cinema Francais, 1990
Magnus, Carl & Jörgen Nash. Heimrad Prem, Hardy Strid, Jens Jørgen Thorsen, Situationister I Konsten, 1966
McDonough, Tom. The Situationists and the City, 2009
Nash, Jørgen. Hanegal: Gallisk Poesialbum, 1961
Nash, Jørgen. Her er jeg: Samlede Digte 1942-75, 1975
Not Bored!: Anthology 1983-2010 , 2011
Nuttall, Jeff. Bomb Culture, 1970
Ohrt, Robert. Phantom Avantgarde:Eine Geschichte der Situationistischen Internationale und der modernen Kunst, 1990
On the Passage of a few people through a rather brief moment in time: The Situationist International 1957-1972 , 1989
Peters, Louis F. Kunst en Revolte, 1969
Plant, Sadie. The Most Radical Gesture: The Situationist International in a postmodern age, 1992
Pomerand, Gabriel. Saint Ghetto of the Loans: Grimoire, 2006
Rasmussen, Mikkel Bolt & Jakob Jakobsen. Expect Anything Fear Nothing, 2011
Rosemont, Franklin. Surrealism & Its Popular Accomplices, 1980
Rosendal, Björn The Emotional Intelligence, 1981
Stansill, Peter & David Zane Mairowitz. Bamn (By Any Means Necessary): Outlaw Manifestos and Ephemera 1965-1970, 1971
Thorsen, Jens Jorgen. 1957-70 Situationister, 1971
Vague, Tom. Anarchy in the UK: The Angry Brigade, 1997
Vaneigam, Raoul. Banalita di base, 1969
Vaneigam, Raoul Traité de savoir-vivre à l'usage des jeunes générations, 1967
Vaneigem, Raoul. The Movement of the Free Spirit, 1994
Wark, McKenzie. The Beach beneath the Street, 2011
Woods, Alan. The Map is Not the Territory, 2000
Zweifel, Stefan & Juri Steiner, Heinz Stahlhut. In Girum Imus Nocte et Consumimur Igni - The Situationist International (1957-1972), 1978

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Situationist Collection, #8111. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
